easy.title: Build a One-Page Portfolio
easy.description:
Create a single-page portfolio with hero, about, skills, projects, and contact sections
Use semantic HTML throughout
Style with CSS (Flexbox/Grid for layout)
Make it fully responsive
Include a working contact form (use Formspree or similar)
Add smooth scrolling for navigation
easy.starterCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Build a One-Page Portfolio</title>
</head>
<body>
  
</body>
</html>

medium.title: Multi-Page Portfolio with Blog
medium.description:
Create a multi-page portfolio (home, about, projects, blog, contact)
Each project needs a dedicated case study page
Blog section with at least 3 sample articles
Consistent navigation across all pages
Implement a card-based project grid with filtering
Add a working search feature for blog posts

hard.title: Portfolio with CMS Integration
hard.description:
Implement a headless CMS (Sanity, Contentful, or Strapi) for content management
Fetch and display projects, skills, testimonials, and blog posts from the CMS
Implement preview mode for unpublished content
Add incremental static regeneration or on-demand revalidation
Build a custom admin interface for managing portfolio content
Include image optimization with CDN transforms
